languages.original_text: "I will cautiously permit myself to note that during our joint projects, Decabalus 4-16 has not given me a single reason to question his integrity. His rank is quite high, and I would recommend that you think twice before criticising his submitted theses."

languages.text: "Осторожно позволю себе заметить, что во время наших совместных проектов Декабалус 4-16 не дал ни единого повода усомниться в своей добропорядочности. Его сан достаточно высок, и я рекомендовал бы дважды подумать, прежде чем подвергать критике выдвигаемые им тезисы".

"I will cautiously permit myself to note that during our joint projects, Decabalus 4-16 has not given me a single reason to question his integrity. His rank is quite high, and I would recommend that you think twice before criticising his submitted theses."

languages.text: 「私は慎重に自分の意見を述べますが、我々の共同プロジェクトの間、デカバラス4-16は一度も私の彼の誠実さに対する疑いを生じさせませんでした。彼の階級は非常に高いので、彼の提出した論文を批判する前に、よく考えてほしいと思います」
languages.original_text: "I will cautiously permit myself to note that during our joint projects, Decabalus 4-16 has not given me a single reason to question his integrity. His rank is quite high, and I would recommend that you think twice before criticising his submitted theses."

traits.locale_text: 「私は慎重に自分の意見を述べますが、我々の共同プロジェクトの間、デカバラス4-16は一度も私の彼の誠実さに対する疑いを生じさせませんでした。彼の階級は非常に高いので、彼の提出した論文を批判する前に、よく考えてほしいと思います。」

languages.text: « Je me permets prudemment de noter que lorsque nous avons travaillé sur des projets communs, Décabalus 4-16 ne m'a jamais donné la moindre raison de douter de son intégrité. Je vous recommanderais de réfléchir à deux fois avant de critiquer les thèses d'un artisan de haut rang. »
languages.original_text: "I will cautiously permit myself to note that during our joint projects, Decabalus 4-16 has not given me a single reason to question his integrity. His rank is quite high, and I would recommend that you think twice before criticising his submitted theses."

traits.locale_text: « Je me permets prudemment de noter que lorsque nous avons travaillé sur des projets communs, Décabalus 4-16 ne m'a jamais donné la moindre raison de douter de son intégrité. Je vous recommanderais de réfléchir à deux fois avant de critiquer les thèses d'un artisan de haut rang. »

languages.text: "Ich gestatte mir in aller Vorsicht, darauf hinzuweisen, dass mir Decabalus 4-16 während unserer gemeinsamen Projekte nie einen Grund gegeben hat, an seiner Integrität zu zweifeln. Sein Rang ist recht hoch, und ich würde Euch dringend davon abraten, seine Thesen unbedacht zu kritisieren."
languages.original_text: "I will cautiously permit myself to note that during our joint projects, Decabalus 4-16 has not given me a single reason to question his integrity. His rank is quite high, and I would recommend that you think twice before criticising his submitted theses."

Sein Rang ist recht hoch, und ich würde Euch dringend davon abraten, seine Thesen unbedacht zu kritisieren."

languages.text: "Ortak projelerimiz sırasında Decabalus 4-16'nın bana dürüstlüğünü sorgulamam için tek bir neden bile vermediğini ihtiyatla belirtmeme izin verin. Rütbesi oldukça yüksek ve sunduğu tezleri eleştirmeden önce iki kez düşünmenizi tavsiye ederim."
languages.original_text: "I will cautiously permit myself to note that during our joint projects, Decabalus 4-16 has not given me a single reason to question his integrity. His rank is quite high, and I would recommend that you think twice before criticising his submitted theses."

languages.text: «Me aventuro a decir que, durante nuestros proyectos conjuntos, Decabalus 4-16 no me ha dado un solo motivo para dudar de su integridad. Ostenta un rango bastante elevado, y le sugiero que se lo piense dos veces antes de criticar sus postulados».

languages.text: “请容我谨慎地指出，在我们的项目合作期间，德卡巴洛斯4-16从未给过我任何质疑他正直品行的由头。他的头衔相当高，我建议您在批评他的论文之前，三思而后行。”
